```diff
+import React, { useState } from 'react';

+const ModelsPage: React.FC = () =&gt; {
+  const navigate = useNavigate();
+  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState&lt;'card' | 'list'&gt;('card');
+  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
+  const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState('all');
+  const [selectedSource, setSelectedSource] = useState('all');
+
+  const filteredModels = mockModels.filter((model) =&gt; {
+    const matchSearch = searchQuery === '' ||
+      model.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
+      model.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());
+    const matchSource = selectedSource === 'all' || model.source === selectedSource;
+    return matchSearch &amp;&amp; matchSource;
+  });
+
+  return (
+    &lt;div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50"&gt;
+      &lt;Header /&gt;
+      &lt;div className="flex"&gt;
+        &lt;Sidebar /&gt;
+        &lt;main className="flex-1 p-8"&gt;
+          {/* Page Header */}
+          &lt;div className="mb-8"&gt;
+            &lt;h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2"&gt;模型库&lt;/h1&gt;

+          &lt;/div&gt;
+
+          {/* Search and Filters */}
+          &lt;div className="mb-6 flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4"&gt;
+            {/* Search Bar */}
+            &lt;div className="flex-1 relative"&gt;
+              &lt;Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" /&gt;
+              &lt;input
+                type="text"
+                placeholder="搜索模型名称、描述或标签..."
+                value={searchQuery}
+                onChange={(e) =&gt; setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+                className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent"
+              /&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+
+            {/* Filter Dropdowns */}
+            &lt;div className="flex gap-3"&gt;
+              &lt;button className="px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+                &lt;Filter className="h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+                &lt;span&gt;筛选&lt;/span&gt;
+              &lt;/button&gt;
+              &lt;select
+                value={selectedSource}
+                onChange={(e) =&gt; setSelectedSource(e.target.value)}
+                className="px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
+              &gt;
+                &lt;option value="all"&gt;全部来源&lt;/option&gt;
+                &lt;option value="自研"&gt;自研&lt;/option&gt;
+                &lt;option value="接入"&gt;接入&lt;/option&gt;
+              &lt;/select&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+
+          {/* View Toggle and Count */}
+          &lt;div className="mb-6 flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+            &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+              &lt;button
+                onClick={() =&gt; setViewMode('card')}
+                className={&#96;p-2 rounded ${viewMode === 'card' ? 'bg-gray-200' : 'hover:bg-gray-100'}&#96;}
+              &gt;
+                &lt;LayoutGrid className="h-5 w-5" /&gt;
+              &lt;/button&gt;
+              &lt;button
+                onClick={() =&gt; setViewMode('list')}
+                className={&#96;p-2 rounded ${viewMode === 'list' ? 'bg-gray-200' : 'hover:bg-gray-100'}&#96;}
+              &gt;
+                &lt;List className="h-5 w-5" /&gt;
+              &lt;/button&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;div className="text-gray-600"&gt;
+              共 {filteredModels.length} 个模型
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+
+          {/* Models Grid */}
+          {viewMode === 'card' ? (
+            &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6"&gt;
+              {filteredModels.map((model) =&gt; (
+                &lt;div
+                  key={model.id}
+                  className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow duration-200"
+                &gt;
+                  &lt;div className="p-6"&gt;
+                    {/* Header */}
+                    &lt;div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3"&gt;
+                      &lt;h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900"&gt;{model.name}&lt;/h3&gt;
+                      &lt;span className={&#96;px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
+                        model.source === '自研'
+                          ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white'
+                          : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700'
+                      }&#96;}&gt;
+                        {model.source}
+                      &lt;/span&gt;
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                    {/* Description */}
+                    &lt;p className="text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4 line-clamp-3"&gt;
+                      {model.description}
+                    &lt;/p&gt;
+
+                    {/* Parameters */}
+                    &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-6 mb-4 text-sm"&gt;
+                      &lt;div&gt;
+                        &lt;span className="text-gray-500"&gt;参数量: &lt;/span&gt;
+                        &lt;span className="font-medium text-gray-900"&gt;{model.parameters}&lt;/span&gt;
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+                      &lt;div&gt;
+                        &lt;span className="text-gray-500"&gt;上下文: &lt;/span&gt;
+                        &lt;span className="font-medium text-gray-900"&gt;{model.contextWindow}&lt;/span&gt;
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                    {/* Tags */}
+                    &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-4"&gt;
+                      {model.tags.map((tag, index) =&gt; (
+                        &lt;span
+                          key={index}
+                          className="px-2.5 py-1 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 text-xs rounded"
+                        &gt;
+                          {tag}
+                        &lt;/span&gt;
+                      ))}
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                    {/* Metrics */}
+                    &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-6 mb-4 text-sm"&gt;
+                      &lt;div&gt;
+                        &lt;span className="text-green-600 font-medium"&gt;准确率: {model.accuracy}&lt;/span&gt;
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+                      &lt;div&gt;
+                        &lt;span className="text-blue-600 font-medium"&gt;BLEU: {model.bleu}&lt;/span&gt;
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                    {/* CTA Button */}
+                    &lt;button
+                      onClick={() =&gt; navigate(&#96;/models/${model.id}&#96;)}
+                      className="w-full bg-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-800 text-white py-2.5 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-colors"
+                    &gt;
+                      查看详情

+                    &lt;/button&gt;
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+              ))}
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          ) : (
+            /* List View */
+            &lt;div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200"&gt;
+              &lt;table className="w-full"&gt;
+                &lt;thead className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200"&gt;
+                  &lt;tr&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider"&gt;

+                      操作
+                    &lt;/th&gt;
+                  &lt;/tr&gt;
+                &lt;/thead&gt;
+                &lt;tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-200"&gt;
+                  {filteredModels.map((model) =&gt; (

+                      &lt;td className="px-6 py-4"&gt;
+                        &lt;div className="font-medium text-gray-900"&gt;{model.name}&lt;/div&gt;
```

Perfect! I've successfully optimized the model library list UI to match the design image. Here's what was implemented:

## Key Changes Made:

**1. Card-Based Grid Layout**
- 3-column responsive grid layout matching the design
- Clean white cards with subtle borders and hover effects

**2. Model Card Design**
- Model name with source badge (自研/接入) - black badge for 自研, gray for 接入
- Comprehensive description text
- Parameters count and context window display
- Subject/category tags as small badges
- Accuracy and BLEU score metrics with color coding (green for accuracy, blue for BLEU)
- Black CTA button "查看详情" with arrow icon

**3. Enhanced Search & Filters**
- Search bar with icon for model name/description search
- Filter button and source dropdown (全部来源/自研/接入)
- View toggle between card and list views (卡片视图/列表视图)
- Total model count display

**4. Updated Mock Data**
- Replaced generic models with education-focused models matching the design:
  - EduMath-7B (理科教育)
  - EduChinese-13B (文科教育)
  - GPT-4-Edu (通用教育)
  - K12-Math-7B (K12数学)
  - English-Teaching-13B (英语教学)
  - Code-Edu-3B (编程教育)

**5. List View Alternative**
- Table layout for users who prefer list view
- Shows key information in columns

The UI now closely matches the design image with proper spacing, typography, and visual hierarchy. The dev server is running at http://localhost:5173/models for preview.

Chunk 1**

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,311 @@
+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
+import MainLayout from '../../../components/layout/MainLayout';
+import Pagination from '../../../components/common/Pagination';
+import EmptyState from '../../../components/common/EmptyState';
+import { mockModelService } from '../../../mock/mockService';
+import type { ModelItem } from '../../../types/dashboard';
+
+// 根据参数量估算上下文窗口
+const getContextWindow = (params: string): string =&gt; {
+  if (params.includes('T')) return '32,768';
+  if (params.includes('72B') || params.includes('70B')) return '16,384';
+  if (params.includes('13B')) return '16,384';
+  if (params.includes('7B') || params.includes('6B')) return '8,192';
+  if (params.includes('3B')) return '4,096';
+  return '8,192';
+};
+
+// 根据模型框架判断来源
+const getSource = (framework: string): '自研' | '接入' =&gt; {
+  const externalFrameworks = ['OpenAI', 'Anthropic', 'Google', 'Meta'];
+  return externalFrameworks.includes(framework) ? '接入' : '自研';
+};
+
+// 估算 BLEU 值
+const getBleu = (accuracy?: number): string =&gt; {
+  if (!accuracy) return '0.80';
+  return (accuracy / 100 * 0.95 - 0.03).toFixed(2);
+};
+
+const ModelsListPage: React.FC = () =&gt; {
+  const navigate = useNavigate();
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [models, setModels] = useState&lt;ModelItem[]&gt;([]);
+  const [pagination, setPagination] = useState({ current: 1, pageSize: 12, total: 0 });
+  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
+  const [selectedType, setSelectedType] = useState('all');
+  const [selectedSource, setSelectedSource] = useState('all');
+  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState&lt;'card' | 'list'&gt;('card');
+
+  const fetchModels = async () =&gt; {
+    setLoading(true);
+    try {
+      const response = await mockModelService.getModels({
+        page: pagination.current,
+        size: pagination.pageSize,
+        name: searchQuery || undefined,
+      });
+      if (response.code === 200) {
+        let records = [...response.data.records];
+
+        // 前端筛选
+        if (selectedType !== 'all') {
+          records = records.filter(m =&gt; m.type === selectedType);
+        }
+        if (selectedSource !== 'all') {
+          records = records.filter(m =&gt; getSource(m.framework) === selectedSource);
+        }
+
+        setModels(records);
+        setPagination(prev =&gt; ({
+          ...prev,
+          total: response.data.total
+        }));
+      }
+    } catch (err) {
+      console.error('Failed to fetch models:', err);
+    } finally {
+      setLoading(false);
+    }
+  };
+
+  useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    fetchModels();
+  }, [pagination.current, searchQuery, selectedType, selectedSource]);
+
+  const handlePageChange = (page: number, pageSize?: number) =&gt; {
+    setPagination(prev =&gt; ({ ...prev, current: page, pageSize: pageSize || prev.pageSize }));
+  };
+
+  return (
+    &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+      {/* Page Header */}
+      &lt;div className="mb-8"&gt;
+        &lt;h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2"&gt;模型库&lt;/h1&gt;
+        &lt;p className="text-gray-500"&gt;探索平台已接入及自研的各类大模型，按需选择最适合的AI能力&lt;/p&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Search &amp; Filters */}
+      &lt;div className="mb-6 flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4"&gt;
+        &lt;div className="flex-1 relative"&gt;
+          &lt;svg className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+            &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" /&gt;
+          &lt;/svg&gt;
+          &lt;input
+            type="text"
+            placeholder="搜索模型名称、描述或标签..."
+            value={searchQuery}
+            onChange={(e) =&gt; setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent text-sm"
+          /&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;div className="flex gap-3"&gt;
+          &lt;select
+            value={selectedType}
+            onChange={(e) =&gt; setSelectedType(e.target.value)}
+            className="px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg bg-white text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
+          &gt;
+            &lt;option value="all"&gt;全部类型&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="llm"&gt;大型语言模型&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="multimodal"&gt;多模态模型&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="embedding"&gt;嵌入模型&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="classifier"&gt;分类模型&lt;/option&gt;
+          &lt;/select&gt;
+          &lt;select
+            value={selectedSource}
+            onChange={(e) =&gt; setSelectedSource(e.target.value)}
+            className="px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg bg-white text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
+          &gt;
+            &lt;option value="all"&gt;全部来源&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="自研"&gt;自研&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="接入"&gt;接入&lt;/option&gt;
+          &lt;/select&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* View Toggle &amp; Count */}
+      &lt;div className="mb-6 flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+        &lt;div className="flex items-center bg-gray-100 rounded-lg p-0.5"&gt;
+          &lt;button
+            onClick={() =&gt; setViewMode('card')}
+            className={&#96;px-4 py-1.5 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
+              viewMode === 'card' ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
+            }&#96;}
+          &gt;
+            卡片视图
+          &lt;/button&gt;
+          &lt;button
+            onClick={() =&gt; setViewMode('list')}
+            className={&#96;px-4 py-1.5 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
+              viewMode === 'list' ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
+            }&#96;}
+          &gt;
+            列表视图
+          &lt;/button&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;span className="text-sm text-gray-500"&gt;共 {models.length} 个模型&lt;/span&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Loading */}
+      {loading ? (
+        &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center py-20"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-gray-900"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      ) : models.length &gt; 0 ? (
+        &lt;&gt;
+          {viewMode === 'card' ? (
+            /* Card Grid */
+            &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6"&gt;
+              {models.map((model) =&gt; {
+                const source = getSource(model.framework);
+                const contextWindow = getContextWindow(model.parameters);
+                const bleu = getBleu(model.metrics.accuracy);
+                return (
+                  &lt;div
+                    key={model.id}
+                    className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200 flex flex-col"
+                  &gt;
+                    &lt;div className="p-6 flex-1 flex flex-col"&gt;
+                      {/* Name &amp; Badge */}
+                      &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3"&gt;
+                        &lt;h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900"&gt;{model.name}&lt;/h3&gt;
+                        &lt;span className={&#96;px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium shrink-0 ml-3 ${
+                          source === '自研'
+                            ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white'
+                            : 'border border-gray-300 text-gray-600'
+                        }&#96;}&gt;
+                          {source}
+                        &lt;/span&gt;
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                      {/* Description */}
+                      &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-500 leading-relaxed mb-4 line-clamp-2 min-h-[40px]"&gt;
+                        {model.description}
+                      &lt;/p&gt;
+
+                      {/* Parameters &amp; Context */}
+                      &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-6 mb-4 text-sm"&gt;
+                        &lt;div&gt;
+                          &lt;span className="text-gray-400"&gt;参数量: &lt;/span&gt;
+                          &lt;span className="font-semibold text-gray-900"&gt;{model.parameters}&lt;/span&gt;
+                        &lt;/div&gt;
+                        &lt;div&gt;
+                          &lt;span className="text-gray-400"&gt;上下文: &lt;/span&gt;
+                          &lt;span className="font-semibold text-gray-900"&gt;{contextWindow}&lt;/span&gt;
+                        &lt;/div&gt;
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                      {/* Tags */}
+                      &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-4"&gt;
+                        {(model.tags || []).slice(0, 4).map((tag, idx) =&gt; (
+                          &lt;span
+                            key={idx}
+                            className="px-3 py-1 border border-gray-200 rounded-full text-xs text-gray-600"
+                          &gt;
+                            {tag}
+                          &lt;/span&gt;
+                        ))}
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                      {/* Metrics */}
+                      &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-6 mb-5 text-sm"&gt;
+                        &lt;div&gt;
+                          &lt;span className="text-gray-400"&gt;准确率: &lt;/span&gt;
+                          &lt;span className="font-semibold text-gray-900"&gt;{model.metrics.accuracy}%&lt;/span&gt;
+                        &lt;/div&gt;
+                        &lt;div&gt;
+                          &lt;span className="text-gray-400"&gt;BLEU: &lt;/span&gt;
+                          &lt;span className="font-semibold text-gray-900"&gt;{bleu}&lt;/span&gt;
+                        &lt;/div&gt;
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                      {/* CTA Button */}
+                      &lt;button
+                        onClick={() =&gt; navigate(&#96;/models/${model.id}&#96;)}
+                        className="w-full mt-auto py-3 bg-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-800 text-white rounded-lg text-sm font-medium flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-colors"
+                      &gt;
+                        查看详情
+                        &lt;svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                          &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M14 5l7 7m0 0l-7 7m7-7H3" /&gt;
+                        &lt;/svg&gt;
+                      &lt;/button&gt;
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+                );
+              })}
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          ) : (
+            /* List View */
+            &lt;div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden"&gt;
+              &lt;table className="w-full"&gt;
+                &lt;thead&gt;
+                  &lt;tr className="border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50"&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase"&gt;模型名称&lt;/th&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase"&gt;来源&lt;/th&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase"&gt;参数量&lt;/th&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase"&gt;准确率&lt;/th&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase"&gt;BLEU&lt;/th&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase"&gt;操作&lt;/th&gt;
+                  &lt;/tr&gt;
+                &lt;/thead&gt;
+                &lt;tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100"&gt;
+                  {models.map((model) =&gt; {
+                    const source = getSource(model.framework);
+                    const bleu = getBleu(model.metrics.accuracy);
+                    return (
+                      &lt;tr key={model.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"&gt;
+                        &lt;td className="px-6 py-4"&gt;
+                          &lt;div className="font-medium text-gray-900"&gt;{model.name}&lt;/div&gt;
+                          &lt;div className="text-sm text-gray-500 line-clamp-1 max-w-md"&gt;{model.description}&lt;/div&gt;
+                        &lt;/td&gt;
+                        &lt;td className="px-6 py-4"&gt;
+                          &lt;span className={&#96;px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
+                            source === '自研'
+                              ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white'
+                              : 'border border-gray-300 text-gray-600'
+                          }&#96;}&gt;
+                            {source}
+                          &lt;/span&gt;
+                        &lt;/td&gt;
+                        &lt;td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900"&gt;{model.parameters}&lt;/td&gt;
+                        &lt;td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900"&gt;{model.metrics.accuracy}%&lt;/td&gt;
+                        &lt;td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900"&gt;{bleu}&lt;/td&gt;
+                        &lt;td className="px-6 py-4"&gt;
+                          &lt;button
+                            onClick={() =&gt; navigate(&#96;/models/${model.id}&#96;)}
+                            className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors"
+                          &gt;
+                            查看详情 →
+                          &lt;/button&gt;
+                        &lt;/td&gt;
+                      &lt;/tr&gt;
+                    );
+                  })}
+                &lt;/tbody&gt;
+              &lt;/table&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          )}
+
+          {/* Pagination */}
+          &lt;div className="mt-6"&gt;
+            &lt;Pagination
+              current={pagination.current}
+              pageSize={pagination.pageSize}
+              total={pagination.total}
+              onChange={handlePageChange}

+          &lt;/div&gt;
```

```diff
+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
+import MainLayout from '../../../components/layout/MainLayout';
+import Pagination from '../../../components/common/Pagination';
+import EmptyState from '../../../components/common/EmptyState';
+import { mockModelService } from '../../../mock/mockService';
+import type { ModelItem } from '../../../types/dashboard';
+
+const ModelsListPage: React.FC = () =&gt; {
+  const navigate = useNavigate();
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [models, setModels] = useState&lt;ModelItem[]&gt;([]);
+  const [pagination, setPagination] = useState({ current: 1, pageSize: 12, total: 0 });
+  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
+  const [selectedType, setSelectedType] = useState('all');
+  const [selectedSource, setSelectedSource] = useState('all');
+  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState&lt;'card' | 'list'&gt;('card');
+
+  const fetchModels = async () =&gt; {
+    setLoading(true);
+    try {
+      const response = await mockModelService.getModels({
+        page: pagination.current,
+        size: pagination.pageSize,
+        name: searchQuery || undefined,
+      });
+      if (response.code === 200) {
+        let records = [...response.data.records];
+        if (selectedType !== 'all') {
+          records = records.filter(m =&gt; m.category === selectedType);
+        }
+        if (selectedSource !== 'all') {
+          records = records.filter(m =&gt; (m.source || '') === selectedSource);
+        }
+        setModels(records);
+        setPagination(prev =&gt; ({ ...prev, total: response.data.total }));
+      }
+    } catch (err) {
+      console.error('Failed to fetch models:', err);
+    } finally {
+      setLoading(false);
+    }
+  };
+
+  useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    fetchModels();
+  }, [pagination.current, searchQuery, selectedType, selectedSource]);
+
+  const handlePageChange = (page: number, pageSize?: number) =&gt; {
+    setPagination(prev =&gt; ({ ...prev, current: page, pageSize: pageSize || prev.pageSize }));
+  };
+
+  return (
+    &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+
```

```diff
+                      &lt;span className="text-gray-400"&gt;性能指标: &lt;/span&gt;
+                      &lt;p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1 line-clamp-2"&gt;
+                        {model.performanceMetrics || &#96;准确率${model.metrics.accuracy}%，推理速度${model.metrics.inferenceSpeed}ms&#96;}
+                      &lt;/p&gt;
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                    {/* CTA Button */}
+                    &lt;button
+                      onClick={() =&gt; navigate(&#96;/models/${model.id}&#96;)}
+                      className="w-full mt-auto py-3 bg-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-800 text-white rounded-lg text-sm font-medium flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-colors"
+                    &gt;
+                      查看详情
+                      &lt;svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                        &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M14 5l7 7m0 0l-7 7m7-7H3" /&gt;
+                      &lt;/svg&gt;
+                    &lt;/button&gt;
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+              ))}
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          ) : (
+            /* List View */
+            &lt;div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden"&gt;
+              &lt;table className="w-full"&gt;
+                &lt;thead&gt;
+                  &lt;tr className="border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50"&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase"&gt;模型名称&lt;/th&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase"&gt;来源&lt;/th&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase"&gt;类型&lt;/th&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase"&gt;部署方式&lt;/th&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase"&gt;训练方式&lt;/th&gt;
+                    &lt;th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase"&gt;操作&lt;/th&gt;
+                  &lt;/tr&gt;
+                &lt;/thead&gt;
+                &lt;tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100"&gt;
+                  {models.map((model) =&gt; (
+                    &lt;tr key={model.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"&gt;
+                      &lt;td className="px-6 py-4"&gt;
+                        &lt;div className="font-medium text-gray-900"&gt;{model.name}&lt;/div&gt;
+                        &lt;div className="text-sm text-gray-500 line-clamp-1 max-w-md"&gt;{model.description}&lt;/div&gt;
+                      &lt;/td&gt;
+                      &lt;td className="px-6 py-4"&gt;
+                        &lt;span className={&#96;px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
+                          model.source === '自研'
+                            ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white'
+                            : 'border border-gray-300 text-gray-600'
+                        }&#96;}&gt;
+                          {model.source || '接入'}
+                        &lt;/span&gt;
+                      &lt;/td&gt;
+                      &lt;td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm text-gray-900"&gt;{model.category}&lt;/td&gt;
+                      &lt;td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm text-gray-900"&gt;{model.deploymentMode || '云端部署'}&lt;/td&gt;
+                      &lt;td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm text-gray-900"&gt;{model.trainingMethod || '领域预训练+微调'}&lt;/td&gt;
+                      &lt;td className="px-6 py-4"&gt;
+                        &lt;button
+                          onClick={() =&gt; navigate(&#96;/models/${model.id}&#96;)}
+                          className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors"
+                        &gt;
+                          查看详情 →
+                        &lt;/button&gt;
+                      &lt;/td&gt;
+                    &lt;/tr&gt;
+                  ))}
+                &lt;/tbody&gt;
+              &lt;/table&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          )}
+
+          {/* Pagination */}
+          &lt;div className="mt-6"&gt;
+            &lt;Pagination
+              current={pagination.current}
+              pageSize={pagination.pageSize}
+              total={pagination.total}
+              onChange={handlePageChange}
+            /&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/&gt;
+      ) : (
+        &lt;EmptyState
+          title="暂无模型"
+          description="没有找到符合条件的模型，您可以尝试调整搜索条件"
+        /&gt;
+      )}
+    &lt;/MainLayout&gt;
+  );
+};
+
+export default ModelsListPage;
```

</details>
</tool-use>

```diff
+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
+import MainLayout from '../../../components/layout/MainLayout';

+import EmptyState from '../../../components/common/EmptyState';
+import { mockModelService } from '../../../mock/mockService';
+import type { ModelItem } from '../../../types/dashboard';
+
+const ModelsListPage: React.FC = () =&gt; {
+  const navigate = useNavigate();
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [models, setModels] = useState&lt;ModelItem[]&gt;([]);
+  const [pagination, setPagination] = useState({ current: 1, pageSize: 12, total: 0 });
+  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
+  const [selectedType, setSelectedType] = useState('all');
+  const [selectedSource, setSelectedSource] = useState('all');
+  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState&lt;'card' | 'list'&gt;('card');
+
+  const fetchModels = async () =&gt; {
+    setLoading(true);
+    try {
+      const response = await mockModelService.getModels({
+        page: pagination.current,
+        size: pagination.pageSize,
+        name: searchQuery || undefined,
+      });
+      if (response.code === 200) {
+        let records = [...response.data.records];
+        if (selectedType !== 'all') {
+          records = records.filter(m =&gt; m.category === selectedType);
+        }
+        if (selectedSource !== 'all') {
+          records = records.filter(m =&gt; (m.source || '') === selectedSource);
+        }
+        setModels(records);
+        setPagination(prev =&gt; ({ ...prev, total: response.data.total }));
+      }
+    } catch (err) {
+      console.error('Failed to fetch models:', err);
+    } finally {
+      setLoading(false);
+    }
+  };
+
+  useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    fetchModels();
+  }, [pagination.current, searchQuery, selectedType, selectedSource]);
+
+  const handlePageChange = (page: number, pageSize?: number) =&gt; {
+    setPagination(prev =&gt; ({ ...prev, current: page, pageSize: pageSize || prev.pageSize }));
+  };
+
+  return (
+    &lt;MainLayout&gt;

+

+            &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" /&gt;
+          &lt;/svg&gt;
+          &lt;input
+            type="text"
+            placeholder="搜索模型名称或描述..."
+            value={searchQuery}
+            onChange={(e) =&gt; setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full pl-11 pr-4 py-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-300 focus:border-transparent text-sm"
+          /&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
```

```diff
+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
+import MainLayout from '../../../components/layout/MainLayout';
+import { mockModelService } from '../../../mock/mockService';
+import type { ModelItem } from '../../../types/dashboard';
+
+const ModelDetailPage: React.FC = () =&gt; {
+  const { id } = useParams&lt;{ id: string }&gt;();
+  const navigate = useNavigate();
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [model, setModel] = useState&lt;ModelItem | null&gt;(null);
+  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview');
+
+  const fetchModelDetail = async () =&gt; {
+    if (!id) return;
+    setLoading(true);
+    try {
+      const response = await mockModelService.getModelDetail(id);
+      if (response.code === 200) {
+        setModel(response.data);
+      }
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error('获取模型详情失败:', error);
+    } finally {
+      setLoading(false);
+    }
+  };
+
+  useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    fetchModelDetail();
+  }, [id]);
+
+  if (loading) {
+    return (
+      &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+        &lt;div className="min-h-96 flex items-center justify-center"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-gray-900"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/MainLayout&gt;
+    );
+  }
+
+  if (!model) {
+    return (
+      &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+        &lt;div className="text-center py-12"&gt;
+          &lt;h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2"&gt;模型不存在&lt;/h2&gt;
+          &lt;p className="text-gray-500 mb-4"&gt;该模型可能已被删除或不存在&lt;/p&gt;
+          &lt;button onClick={() =&gt; navigate('/models')} className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-800"&gt;
+            返回模型列表
+          &lt;/button&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/MainLayout&gt;
+    );
+  }
+
+  const source = model.source || ((['OpenAI', 'Anthropic', 'Google'].includes(model.framework)) ? '接入' : '自研');
+  const typeLabel = model.category || '学科';
+  const contextWindow = (() =&gt; {
+    const p = model.parameters;
+    if (p.includes('T')) return '32,768';
+    if (p.includes('72B') || p.includes('70B')) return '16,384';
+    if (p.includes('13B')) return '16,384';
+    if (p.includes('7B') || p.includes('6B')) return '8,192';
+    if (p.includes('3B')) return '4,096';
+    return '8,192';
+  })();
+  const accuracy = model.metrics.accuracy ? &#96;${model.metrics.accuracy}%&#96; : '92.5%';
+  const bleu = model.metrics.accuracy ? (model.metrics.accuracy / 100 * 0.95 - 0.03).toFixed(2) : '0.85';
+  const trainingData = model.performanceMetrics
+    ? '高校教材 + 历年高考题 + 学术论文'
+    : '高校教材 + 历年高考题 + 学术论文';
+
+  const tabs = [
+    { key: 'overview', label: '概览' },
+    { key: 'capabilities', label: '能力清单' },
+    { key: 'performance', label: '性能指标' },
+    { key: 'api', label: 'API文档' },
+  ];
+
+  return (
+    &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+      {/* Back Button */}
+      &lt;button
+        onClick={() =&gt; navigate('/models')}
+        className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 mb-6 transition-colors"
+      &gt;
+        &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+          &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" /&gt;
+        &lt;/svg&gt;
+        返回模型库
+      &lt;/button&gt;
+
+      {/* Header */}
+      &lt;div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-start md:justify-between gap-4 mb-6"&gt;
+        &lt;div&gt;
+          &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3"&gt;
+            &lt;h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900"&gt;{model.name}&lt;/h1&gt;
+            &lt;span className={&#96;px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
+              source === '自研' ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white' : 'border border-gray-300 text-gray-600'
+            }&#96;}&gt;
+              {source}
+            &lt;/span&gt;
+            &lt;span className="px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border border-gray-300 text-gray-600"&gt;
+              {typeLabel.replace('大模型', '')}
+            &lt;/span&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;p className="text-base text-gray-500 leading-relaxed max-w-3xl"&gt;{model.description}&lt;/p&gt;

+            对比模型

+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Key Metrics - 4 columns */}

+        &lt;/div&gt;

+        &lt;/div&gt;

+

+            className={&#96;px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium border-b-2 -mb-px transition-colors ${

+            }&#96;}
+          &gt;
+            {tab.label}
+          &lt;/button&gt;
+        ))}
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Tab Content */}
+      {activeTab === 'overview' &amp;&amp; (
+        &lt;div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-8"&gt;
+          &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6"&gt;模型版本信息&lt;/h2&gt;
+
+          {/* Basic Info + Applicable Scenarios */}

+              &lt;div className="space-y-3 text-sm"&gt;
+                &lt;div className="flex"&gt;
+                  &lt;span className="text-gray-400 w-16"&gt;版本:&lt;/span&gt;
+                  &lt;span className="text-blue-600"&gt;{model.version || 'v1.0'}&lt;/span&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+                &lt;div className="flex"&gt;

+                  &lt;span className="text-gray-700"&gt;{source}&lt;/span&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+                &lt;div className="flex"&gt;
+                  &lt;span className="text-gray-400 w-16"&gt;类别:&lt;/span&gt;
+                  &lt;span className="text-gray-700"&gt;{typeLabel.replace('大模型', '')}&lt;/span&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;

+              &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2"&gt;
+                {model.subjects.map((subject, idx) =&gt; (
+                  &lt;span key={idx} className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded-lg text-sm"&gt;
+                    {subject}
+                  &lt;/span&gt;
+                ))}
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+
+          &lt;hr className="border-gray-200 my-6" /&gt;
+
+          {/* Training Data */}

+          &lt;/div&gt;
+
+          &lt;hr className="border-gray-200 my-6" /&gt;
+
+          {/* Tags */}

+            &lt;/div&gt;

+                  &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4 text-emerald-600" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;

+

+}&#96;}
```

```diff
+
+const DatasetsListPage: React.FC = () =&gt; {

+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [datasets, setDatasets] = useState&lt;DatasetItem[]&gt;([]);
+  const [pagination, setPagination] = useState({ current: 1, pageSize: 12, total: 0 });
+  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
+  const [selectedSubject, setSelectedSubject] = useState('all');
+  const [selectedType, setSelectedType] = useState('all');
+
+  const fetchDatasets = async () =&gt; {

+        page: pagination.current,
+        size: pagination.pageSize,
+        name: searchQuery || undefined,
+      });
+      if (response.code === 200) {
+        let records = [...response.data.records];
+        if (selectedSubject !== 'all') {
+          records = records.filter(d =&gt; d.subject === selectedSubject);
+        }
+        if (selectedType !== 'all') {
+          records = records.filter(d =&gt; d.dataType === selectedType);
+        }
+        setDatasets(records);
+        setPagination(prev =&gt; ({ ...prev, total: response.data.total }));
+      }
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error('获取数据集列表失败:', error);
+    } finally {
+      setLoading(false);
+    }
+  };
+
+  useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    fetchDatasets();
+  }, [pagination.current, searchQuery, selectedSubject, selectedType]);
+
+  const handlePageChange = (page: number, pageSize?: number) =&gt; {

+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Search &amp; Filters */}

+          &lt;/svg&gt;
+          &lt;input
+            type="text"
+            placeholder="搜索数据集名称、描述或标签..."
+            value={searchQuery}
+            onChange={(e) =&gt; setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full pl-11 pr-4 py-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-300 focus:border-transparent text-sm"
+          /&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl bg-white"&gt;
+            &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+              &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M3 4a1 1 0 011-1h16a1 1 0 011 1v2.586a1 1 0 01-.293.707l-6.414 6.414a1 1 0 00-.293.707V17l-4 4v-6.586a1 1 0 00-.293-.707L3.293 7.293A1 1 0 013 6.586V4z" /&gt;
+            &lt;/svg&gt;
+            &lt;select
+              value={selectedSubject}
+              onChange={(e) =&gt; setSelectedSubject(e.target.value)}
+              className="bg-transparent text-sm focus:outline-none cursor-pointer text-gray-700 pr-2"
+            &gt;
+              &lt;option value="all"&gt;全部学科&lt;/option&gt;
+              &lt;option value="理科"&gt;理科&lt;/option&gt;
+              &lt;option value="文科"&gt;文科&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;/select&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;select
+            value={selectedType}
+            onChange={(e) =&gt; setSelectedType(e.target.value)}
+            className="px-4 py-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl bg-white text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-300 cursor-pointer text-gray-700"
+          &gt;
+            &lt;option value="all"&gt;全部类型&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="文本"&gt;文本&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="题库"&gt;题库&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="视频"&gt;视频&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="图文"&gt;图文&lt;/option&gt;
+          &lt;/select&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Count */}
+      &lt;div className="mb-6"&gt;
+        &lt;span className="text-sm text-gray-500"&gt;共 {datasets.length} 个数据集&lt;/span&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Loading */}
+      {loading ? (
+        &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center py-20"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-gray-900"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      ) : datasets.length &gt; 0 ? (
+        &lt;&gt;
+          {/* Card Grid */}
+          &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6"&gt;
+            {datasets.map((dataset) =&gt; {
+              const subject = dataset.subject || '理科';
+              const dataType = dataset.dataType || '文本';
+              const sizeText = dataset.sizeText || &#96;${(dataset.size / 1024).toFixed(1)} GB&#96;;
+              const recordCount = dataset.recordCount || dataset.sampleCount;
+              const knowledgePoints = dataset.knowledgePoints || dataset.subjects || [];
+              const maxKP = 3;
+              const overflowKP = knowledgePoints.length &gt; maxKP ? knowledgePoints.length - maxKP : 0;
+
+              return (
+                &lt;div
+                  key={dataset.id}
+                  className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200 flex flex-col"
+                &gt;
+                  &lt;div className="p-6 flex-1 flex flex-col"&gt;
+                    {/* Subject &amp; DataType badges */}
+                    &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3"&gt;
+                      &lt;span className={&#96;px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium border ${
+                        subject === '理科'
+                          ? 'text-blue-700 border-blue-200 bg-blue-50'
+                          : 'text-amber-700 border-amber-200 bg-amber-50'
+                      }&#96;}&gt;
+                        {subject}
+                      &lt;/span&gt;
+                      &lt;span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-gray-500"&gt;
+                        &lt;DataTypeIcon type={dataType} /&gt;
+                        {dataType}
+                      &lt;/span&gt;
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                    {/* Name */}
+                    &lt;h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2"&gt;{dataset.name}&lt;/h3&gt;
+
+                    {/* Description */}
+                    &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-500 leading-relaxed mb-4 line-clamp-2 min-h-[40px]"&gt;
+                      {dataset.description}
+                    &lt;/p&gt;
+
+                    {/* Size &amp; Record Count */}
+                    &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-6 mb-4 text-sm"&gt;
+                      &lt;div&gt;
+                        &lt;span className="text-gray-400"&gt;数据量：&lt;/span&gt;
+                        &lt;span className="font-semibold text-gray-900"&gt;{sizeText}&lt;/span&gt;
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+                      &lt;div&gt;
+                        &lt;span className="text-gray-400"&gt;记录数：&lt;/span&gt;
+                        &lt;span className="font-semibold text-gray-900"&gt;{recordCount.toLocaleString()}&lt;/span&gt;
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                    {/* Knowledge Points */}
+                    &lt;div className="mb-3"&gt;
+                      &lt;div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1.5"&gt;知识点覆盖：&lt;/div&gt;
+                      &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5"&gt;
+                        {knowledgePoints.slice(0, maxKP).map((kp, idx) =&gt; (
+                          &lt;span key={idx} className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 rounded text-xs"&gt;
+                            {kp}
+                          &lt;/span&gt;
+                        ))}
+                        {overflowKP &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+                          &lt;span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-gray-100 text-gray-400 rounded text-xs"&gt;+{overflowKP}&lt;/span&gt;
+                        )}
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                    {/* Tags */}
+                    &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mb-5"&gt;
+                      {dataset.tags.slice(0, 3).map((tag, idx) =&gt; (
+                        &lt;span key={idx} className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 rounded text-xs"&gt;
+                          {tag}
+                        &lt;/span&gt;
+                      ))}
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                    {/* CTA Button */}
+                    &lt;button
+                      onClick={() =&gt; navigate(&#96;/datasets/${dataset.id}&#96;)}
+                      className="w-full mt-auto py-3 bg-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-800 text-white rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
+                    &gt;
+                      查看详情
+                      &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                        &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M14 5l7 7m0 0l-7 7m7-7H3" /&gt;
+                      &lt;/svg&gt;
+                    &lt;/button&gt;
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+              );
+            })}
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+
+          {/* Pagination */}
+          &lt;div className="mt-8"&gt;
+            &lt;Pagination
+              current={pagination.current}
+              pageSize={pagination.pageSize}
+              total={pagination.total}
+              onChange={handlePageChange}
+            /&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/&gt;
+      ) : (
+        &lt;EmptyState
+          title="暂无数据集"
+          description="没有找到符合条件的数据集，您可以尝试调整搜索条件"
+        /&gt;
+      )}
+    &lt;/MainLayout&gt;
+  );
+};
+
+export default DatasetsListPage;
+
```

```diff
+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
+import MainLayout from '../../../components/layout/MainLayout';
+import { mockDatasetService } from '../../../mock/mockService';
+import type { DatasetItem } from '../../../types/dashboard';
+
+const DatasetDetailPage: React.FC = () =&gt; {
+  const { id } = useParams&lt;{ id: string }&gt;();
+  const navigate = useNavigate();
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [dataset, setDataset] = useState&lt;DatasetItem | null&gt;(null);
+  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview');
+
+  const fetchDatasetDetail = async () =&gt; {
+    if (!id) return;
+    setLoading(true);
+    try {
+      const response = await mockDatasetService.getDatasetDetail(id);
+      if (response.code === 200) {
+        setDataset(response.data);
+      }
+    } catch (error) {
+      console.error('获取数据集详情失败:', error);
+    } finally {
+      setLoading(false);
+    }
+  };
+
+  useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    fetchDatasetDetail();
+  }, [id]);
+
+  if (loading) {
+    return (
+      &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+        &lt;div className="min-h-96 flex items-center justify-center"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-gray-900"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/MainLayout&gt;
+    );
+  }
+
+  if (!dataset) {
+    return (
+      &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+        &lt;div className="text-center py-12"&gt;
+          &lt;h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2"&gt;数据集不存在&lt;/h2&gt;
+          &lt;p className="text-gray-500 mb-4"&gt;该数据集可能已被删除或不存在&lt;/p&gt;
+          &lt;button onClick={() =&gt; navigate('/datasets')} className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-800"&gt;
+            返回数据集列表
+          &lt;/button&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/MainLayout&gt;
+    );
+  }
+
+  const subject = dataset.subject || '理科';
+  const dataType = dataset.dataType || '文本';
+  const sizeText = dataset.sizeText || &#96;${(dataset.size / 1024).toFixed(1)} GB&#96;;
+  const recordCount = dataset.recordCount || dataset.sampleCount;
+  const knowledgePoints = dataset.knowledgePoints || dataset.subjects || [];
+
+  const tabs = [
+    { key: 'overview', label: '概览' },
+    { key: 'metadata', label: '元数据' },
+    { key: 'preview', label: '样本预览' },
+    { key: 'compliance', label: '合规信息' },
+  ];
+
+  return (
+    &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+      {/* Back Button */}
+      &lt;button
+        onClick={() =&gt; navigate('/datasets')}
+        className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 mb-6 transition-colors"
+      &gt;
+        &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+          &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" /&gt;
+        &lt;/svg&gt;
+        返回数据集
+      &lt;/button&gt;
+
+      {/* Header */}
+      &lt;div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-start md:justify-between gap-4 mb-6"&gt;
+        &lt;div&gt;
+          &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3"&gt;
+            &lt;h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900"&gt;{dataset.name}&lt;/h1&gt;
+            &lt;span className={&#96;px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
+              subject === '理科' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700' : 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700'
+            }&#96;}&gt;
+              {subject}
+            &lt;/span&gt;
+            &lt;span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-gray-600"&gt;
+              &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M9 12h6m-6 4h6m2 5H7a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h5.586a1 1 0 01.707.293l5.414 5.414a1 1 0 01.293.707V19a2 2 0 01-2 2z" /&gt;
+              &lt;/svg&gt;
+              {dataType}
+            &lt;/span&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;p className="text-base text-gray-500 leading-relaxed max-w-3xl"&gt;{dataset.description}&lt;/p&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;button className="flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2.5 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-800 text-sm font-medium transition-colors shrink-0"&gt;
+          &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+            &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M4 16v1a3 3 0 003 3h10a3 3 0 003-3v-1m-4-4l-4 4m0 0l-4-4m4 4V4" /&gt;
+          &lt;/svg&gt;
+          下载申请
+        &lt;/button&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Key Metrics - 4 columns */}
+      &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8"&gt;
+        &lt;div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-5"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-2"&gt;数据量&lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900"&gt;{sizeText}&lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-5"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-2"&gt;记录数&lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900"&gt;{recordCount.toLocaleString()}&lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-5"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-2"&gt;知识点数&lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900"&gt;{knowledgePoints.length}&lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-5"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-2"&gt;适用任务&lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900"&gt;3&lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Tabs */}
+      &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-6 border-b border-gray-200"&gt;
+        {tabs.map((tab) =&gt; (
+          &lt;button
+            key={tab.key}
+            onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab(tab.key)}
+            className={&#96;px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium border-b-2 -mb-px transition-colors ${
+              activeTab === tab.key
+                ? 'border-gray-900 text-gray-900'
+                : 'border-transparent text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600'
+            }&#96;}
+          &gt;
+            {tab.label}
+          &lt;/button&gt;
+        ))}
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Tab Content */}
+      {activeTab === 'overview' &amp;&amp; (
+        &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+          {/* Basic Info */}
+          &lt;div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-8"&gt;
+            &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6"&gt;基本信息&lt;/h2&gt;
+
+            &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-8 mb-6"&gt;
+              &lt;div&gt;
+                &lt;div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2"&gt;数据类型&lt;/div&gt;
+                &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600"&gt;
+                  &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                    &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M9 12h6m-6 4h6m2 5H7a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h5.586a1 1 0 01.707.293l5.414 5.414a1 1 0 01.293.707V19a2 2 0 01-2 2z" /&gt;
+                  &lt;/svg&gt;
+                  {dataType}
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+              &lt;div&gt;
+                &lt;div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2"&gt;学科分类&lt;/div&gt;
+                &lt;span className={&#96;px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
+                  subject === '理科' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700' : 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700'
+                }&#96;}&gt;
+                  {subject}
+                &lt;/span&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+
+            &lt;hr className="border-gray-200 my-6" /&gt;
+
+            &lt;div className="mb-6"&gt;
+              &lt;div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2"&gt;数据来源&lt;/div&gt;
+              &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-500"&gt;
+                {dataset.tags.join(' + ')}相关教材与资料
+              &lt;/p&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+
+            &lt;hr className="border-gray-200 my-6" /&gt;
+
+            &lt;div&gt;
+              &lt;div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3"&gt;标签&lt;/div&gt;
+              &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2"&gt;
+                {dataset.tags.map((tag, idx) =&gt; (
+                  &lt;span key={idx} className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded-lg text-sm"&gt;
+                    {tag}
+                  &lt;/span&gt;
+                ))}
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+
+          {/* Knowledge Points */}
+          &lt;div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-8"&gt;
+            &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1"&gt;知识点覆盖&lt;/h2&gt;
+            &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-6"&gt;该数据集包含的知识点范围&lt;/p&gt;
+            &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4"&gt;
+              {knowledgePoints.map((kp, idx) =&gt; (
+                &lt;div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 border border-gray-100 rounded-xl"&gt;
+                  &lt;svg className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400 shrink-0" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                    &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M9 5H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v12a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2h-2M9 5a2 2 0 002 2h2a2 2 0 002-2M9 5a2 2 0 012-2h2a2 2 0 012 2" /&gt;
+                  &lt;/svg&gt;
+                  &lt;span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700"&gt;{kp}&lt;/span&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+              ))}
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      )}
+
+      {activeTab === 'metadata' &amp;&amp; (
+        &lt;div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-8"&gt;
+          &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6"&gt;元数据信息&lt;/h2&gt;
+          &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+            {[
+              { label: '数据集ID', value: dataset.id },
+              { label: '数据集编码', value: dataset.code },
+              { label: '版本', value: dataset.version },
+              { label: '数据格式', value: dataset.format?.toUpperCase() },
+              { label: '数据量', value: sizeText },
+              { label: '记录数', value: recordCount.toLocaleString() },
+              { label: '语言', value: dataset.languages?.join(', ') || '中文' },
+              { label: '质量评分', value: &#96;${dataset.qualityScore}/100&#96; },
+              { label: '创建时间', value: new Date(dataset.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('zh-CN') },
+              { label: '发布时间', value: new Date(dataset.publishedAt).toLocaleDateString('zh-CN') },
+            ].map((item, idx) =&gt; (
+              &lt;div key={idx} className="flex items-center py-3 border-b border-gray-100 last:border-0"&gt;
+                &lt;span className="text-sm text-gray-500 w-32 shrink-0"&gt;{item.label}&lt;/span&gt;
+                &lt;span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900"&gt;{item.value}&lt;/span&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+            ))}
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      )}
+
+      {activeTab === 'preview' &amp;&amp; (
+        &lt;div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-8"&gt;
+          &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1"&gt;样本预览&lt;/h2&gt;
+          &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-6"&gt;数据集中的示例数据&lt;/p&gt;
+          &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+            {[1, 2, 3].map((i) =&gt; (
+              &lt;div key={i} className="p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg border border-gray-100"&gt;
+                &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2"&gt;
+                  &lt;span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 rounded text-xs font-medium"&gt;样本 {i}&lt;/span&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+                &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-700 leading-relaxed"&gt;
+                  {i === 1 &amp;&amp; &#96;这是${dataset.name}中的第一条示例数据，展示了数据集的基本格式和内容结构。&#96;}
+                  {i === 2 &amp;&amp; &#96;第二条示例数据，包含了${dataset.tags.join('、')}等相关内容的标注信息。&#96;}
+                  {i === 3 &amp;&amp; &#96;第三条示例数据，体现了数据集在${knowledgePoints.slice(0, 2).join('和')}方面的覆盖范围。&#96;}
+                &lt;/p&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+            ))}
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      )}
+
+      {activeTab === 'compliance' &amp;&amp; (
+        &lt;div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-8"&gt;
+          &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6"&gt;合规信息&lt;/h2&gt;
+          &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+            &lt;div className="flex items-start gap-4 p-4 border border-gray-100 rounded-xl"&gt;
+              &lt;div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-blue-50 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0"&gt;
+                &lt;svg className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                  &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M9 12l2 2 4-4m5.618-4.016A11.955 11.955 0 0112 2.944a11.955 11.955 0 01-8.618 3.04A12.02 12.02 0 003 9c0 5.591 3.824 10.29 9 11.622 5.176-1.332 9-6.03 9-11.622 0-1.042-.133-2.052-.382-3.016z" /&gt;
+                &lt;/svg&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+              &lt;div&gt;
+                &lt;h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-1"&gt;版权说明&lt;/h4&gt;
+                &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-500"&gt;数据来源合法合规，已获得相关授权许可&lt;/p&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;div className="flex items-start gap-4 p-4 border border-gray-100 rounded-xl"&gt;
+              &lt;div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-green-50 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0"&gt;
+                &lt;svg className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                  &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M4 7v10c0 2.21 3.582 4 8 4s8-1.79 8-4V7M4 7c0 2.21 3.582 4 8 4s8-1.79 8-4M4 7c0-2.21 3.582-4 8-4s8 1.79 8 4" /&gt;
+                &lt;/svg&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+              &lt;div&gt;
+                &lt;h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-1"&gt;使用许可&lt;/h4&gt;
+                &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-500"&gt;CC BY-NC-SA 4.0，仅限教育和研究用途&lt;/p&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-xl"&gt;
+              &lt;p className="text-sm text-amber-800"&gt;
+                &lt;span className="font-semibold"&gt;注意：&lt;/span&gt;在使用本数据集前，请确保您已了解并遵守相关的版权和使用许可条款。需要下载完整数据集请联系管理员进行申请。
+              &lt;/p&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      )}
+    &lt;/MainLayout&gt;
+  );
+};
+
+export default DatasetDetailPage;
+
```

---

文件完整。数据集详情页已按效果图优化完成：

1. **顶部**：返回按钮 + 数据集名称 + 学科标签（理科蓝/文科紫）+ 数据类型 + 下载申请按钮
2. **指标卡片**：4列展示数据量、记录数、知识点数、适用任务
3. **Tab导航**：概览、元数据、样本预览、合规信息
4. **概览Tab**：基本信息（数据类型+学科分类）、数据来源、标签、知识点覆盖（卡片网格展示）
5. **元数据Tab**：格式、语言、质量评分、难度等级、版本等
6. **样本预览Tab**：示例数据展示
7. **合规信息Tab**：版权说明、使用许可、注意事项

刷新 http://localhost:5173/datasets 点击任意数据集的"查看详情"即可预览。

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,216 @@
+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
+import MainLayout from '../../../components/layout/MainLayout';
+import Pagination from '../../../components/common/Pagination';
+import EmptyState from '../../../components/common/EmptyState';
+import { MOCK_CASES } from '../../../mock/data';
+import type { CaseItem } from '../../../types/dashboard';
+
+// 院校层级颜色
+const getLevelColor = (level: string) =&gt; {
+  switch (level) {
+    case '985': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-700';
+    case '211': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700';
+    case '职业院校': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700';
+    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
+  }
+};
+
+// 合作类型颜色
+const getCoopColor = (type: string) =&gt; {
+  switch (type) {
+    case '微调': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-700';
+    case '课程共建': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700';
+    case '综合合作': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700';
+    case '算力支持': return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700';
+    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
+  }
+};
+
+const CasesListPage: React.FC = () =&gt; {
+  const navigate = useNavigate();
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [cases, setCases] = useState&lt;CaseItem[]&gt;([]);
+  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
+  const [selectedLevel, setSelectedLevel] = useState('all');
+  const [selectedCoop, setSelectedCoop] = useState('all');
+
+  const fetchCases = async () =&gt; {
+    setLoading(true);
+    await new Promise(resolve =&gt; setTimeout(resolve, 300));
+    let records = [...MOCK_CASES];
+    if (searchQuery) {
+      const q = searchQuery.toLowerCase();
+      records = records.filter(c =&gt;
+        c.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
+        (c.university || '').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
+        c.tags.some(t =&gt; t.toLowerCase().includes(q))
+      );
+    }
+    if (selectedLevel !== 'all') {
+      records = records.filter(c =&gt; c.universityLevel === selectedLevel);
+    }
+    if (selectedCoop !== 'all') {
+      records = records.filter(c =&gt; c.cooperationType === selectedCoop);
+    }
+    setCases(records);
+    setLoading(false);
+  };
+
+  useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    fetchCases();
+  }, [searchQuery, selectedLevel, selectedCoop]);
+
+  return (
+    &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+      {/* Page Header */}
+      &lt;div className="mb-8"&gt;
+        &lt;h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3"&gt;案例集&lt;/h1&gt;
+        &lt;p className="text-gray-500 text-base"&gt;展示与高校合作的标杆案例，按合作院校层级和项目深度进行筛选&lt;/p&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Search &amp; Filters */}
+      &lt;div className="mb-6 flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-center"&gt;
+        &lt;div className="flex-1 relative"&gt;
+          &lt;svg className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+            &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" /&gt;
+          &lt;/svg&gt;
+          &lt;input
+            type="text"
+            placeholder="搜索案例标题、院校名称或标签..."
+            value={searchQuery}
+            onChange={(e) =&gt; setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+            className="w-full pl-11 pr-4 py-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-300 focus:border-transparent text-sm"
+          /&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl bg-white"&gt;
+            &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+              &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M3 4a1 1 0 011-1h16a1 1 0 011 1v2.586a1 1 0 01-.293.707l-6.414 6.414a1 1 0 00-.293.707V17l-4 4v-6.586a1 1 0 00-.293-.707L3.293 7.293A1 1 0 013 6.586V4z" /&gt;
+            &lt;/svg&gt;
+            &lt;select
+              value={selectedLevel}
+              onChange={(e) =&gt; setSelectedLevel(e.target.value)}
+              className="bg-transparent text-sm focus:outline-none cursor-pointer text-gray-700 pr-2"
+            &gt;
+              &lt;option value="all"&gt;全部层级&lt;/option&gt;
+              &lt;option value="985"&gt;985高校&lt;/option&gt;
+              &lt;option value="211"&gt;211高校&lt;/option&gt;
+              &lt;option value="职业院校"&gt;职业院校&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;/select&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;select
+            value={selectedCoop}
+            onChange={(e) =&gt; setSelectedCoop(e.target.value)}
+            className="px-4 py-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl bg-white text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-300 cursor-pointer text-gray-700"
+          &gt;
+            &lt;option value="all"&gt;全部类型&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="微调"&gt;微调&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="课程共建"&gt;课程共建&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="综合合作"&gt;综合合作&lt;/option&gt;
+            &lt;option value="算力支持"&gt;算力支持&lt;/option&gt;
+          &lt;/select&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Count */}
+      &lt;div className="mb-6"&gt;
+        &lt;span className="text-sm text-gray-500"&gt;共 {cases.length} 个案例&lt;/span&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Loading */}
+      {loading ? (
+        &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center py-20"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-gray-900"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      ) : cases.length &gt; 0 ? (
+        &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6"&gt;
+          {cases.map((caseItem) =&gt; {
+            const level = caseItem.universityLevel || '985';
+            const coopType = caseItem.cooperationType || '微调';
+            const university = caseItem.university || caseItem.organization;
+            const outcomes = caseItem.outcomes || ['效率显著提升', '用户满意度达90%以上'];
+            const subjects = caseItem.subjects || [];
+
+            return (
+              &lt;div
+                key={caseItem.id}
+                className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200 flex flex-col overflow-hidden"
+              &gt;
+                {/* Placeholder Image */}
+                &lt;div className="bg-gray-50 h-40 flex items-center justify-center"&gt;
+                  &lt;svg className="h-16 w-16 text-gray-300" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                    &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={1} d="M9 12h6m-6 4h6m2 5H7a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h5.586a1 1 0 01.707.293l5.414 5.414a1 1 0 01.293.707V19a2 2 0 01-2 2z" /&gt;
+                  &lt;/svg&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                &lt;div className="p-5 flex-1 flex flex-col"&gt;
+                  {/* Tags */}
+                  &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3"&gt;
+                    &lt;span className={&#96;px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium ${getLevelColor(level)}&#96;}&gt;
+                      {level}
+                    &lt;/span&gt;
+                    &lt;span className={&#96;px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium ${getCoopColor(coopType)}&#96;}&gt;
+                      {coopType}
+                    &lt;/span&gt;
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                  {/* Title */}
+                  &lt;h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1"&gt;{caseItem.title}&lt;/h3&gt;
+
+                  {/* University */}
+                  &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-500 mb-3"&gt;
+                    &lt;svg className="h-3.5 w-3.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                      &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M17.657 16.657L13.414 20.9a1.998 1.998 0 01-2.827 0l-4.244-4.243a8 8 0 1111.314 0z" /&gt;
+                      &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M15 11a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z" /&gt;
+                    &lt;/svg&gt;
+                    {university}
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                  {/* Outcomes */}
+                  &lt;div className="mb-3"&gt;
+                    &lt;div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1"&gt;落地成效：&lt;/div&gt;
+                    {outcomes.map((outcome, idx) =&gt; (
+                      &lt;div key={idx} className="text-sm text-gray-600 leading-relaxed"&gt;
+                        • {outcome}
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+                    ))}
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                  {/* Subjects */}
+                  &lt;div className="mb-4"&gt;
+                    &lt;div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1.5"&gt;涉及学科：&lt;/div&gt;
+                    &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5"&gt;
+                      {subjects.slice(0, 3).map((s, idx) =&gt; (
+                        &lt;span key={idx} className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 rounded text-xs"&gt;{s}&lt;/span&gt;
+                      ))}
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                  {/* CTA Button */}
+                  &lt;button
+                    onClick={() =&gt; navigate(&#96;/cases/${caseItem.id}&#96;)}
+                    className="w-full mt-auto py-2.5 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white text-gray-700 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
+                  &gt;
+                    查看详情
+                    &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                      &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M14 5l7 7m0 0l-7 7m7-7H3" /&gt;
+                    &lt;/svg&gt;
+                  &lt;/button&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+            );
+          })}
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      ) : (
+        &lt;EmptyState
+          title="暂无案例"
+          description="没有找到符合条件的案例，您可以尝试调整搜索条件"
+        /&gt;
+      )}
+    &lt;/MainLayout&gt;
+  );
+};
+
+export default CasesListPage;
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>
