```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,189 @@
+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
+import MainLayout from '../../../components/layout/MainLayout';
+import EmptyState from '../../../components/common/EmptyState';
+import { MOCK_CASES } from '../../../mock/data';
+import type { CaseItem } from '../../../types/dashboard';
+
+// 主题色配置
+const getThemeColors = (index: number) =&gt; {
+  const themes = [
+    { gradient: 'from-red-600 to-orange-500', bg: 'from-red-50 to-orange-50', iconBg: 'from-red-600 to-orange-500' },
+    { gradient: 'from-blue-600 to-indigo-500', bg: 'from-blue-50 to-indigo-50', iconBg: 'from-blue-600 to-indigo-500' },
+    { gradient: 'from-green-600 to-teal-500', bg: 'from-green-50 to-teal-50', iconBg: 'from-green-600 to-teal-500' },
+    { gradient: 'from-purple-600 to-pink-500', bg: 'from-purple-50 to-pink-50', iconBg: 'from-purple-600 to-pink-500' },
+    { gradient: 'from-cyan-600 to-blue-500', bg: 'from-cyan-50 to-blue-50', iconBg: 'from-cyan-600 to-blue-500' },
+    { gradient: 'from-amber-600 to-yellow-500', bg: 'from-amber-50 to-yellow-50', iconBg: 'from-amber-600 to-yellow-500' },
+  ];
+  return themes[index % themes.length];
+};
+
+const CasesListPage: React.FC = () =&gt; {
+  const navigate = useNavigate();
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [cases, setCases] = useState&lt;CaseItem[]&gt;([]);
+  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
+
+  const fetchCases = async () =&gt; {
+    setLoading(true);
+    await new Promise(resolve =&gt; setTimeout(resolve, 300));
+    let records = [...MOCK_CASES];
+    if (searchQuery) {
+      const q = searchQuery.toLowerCase();
+      records = records.filter(c =&gt;
+        c.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
+        c.summary.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
+        (c.university || '').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
+        c.tags.some(t =&gt; t.toLowerCase().includes(q))
+      );
+    }
+    setCases(records);
+    setLoading(false);
+  };
+
+  useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    fetchCases();
+  }, [searchQuery]);
+
+  return (
+    &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+      {/* Header */}
+      &lt;div className="mb-8"&gt;
+        &lt;h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3"&gt;案例集&lt;/h1&gt;
+        &lt;p className="text-gray-500 text-base"&gt;展示与高校合作的标杆案例，了解如何通过AI能力提升教学质量&lt;/p&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Search */}
+      &lt;div className="mb-8 bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-gray-100"&gt;
+        &lt;div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-center"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="flex-1 relative w-full"&gt;
+            &lt;svg className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+              &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" /&gt;
+            &lt;/svg&gt;
+            &lt;input
+              type="text"
+              placeholder="搜索案例名称、描述或场景..."
+              value={searchQuery}
+              onChange={(e) =&gt; setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+              className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-300 focus:border-transparent text-sm"
+            /&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;div className="text-sm text-gray-500 whitespace-nowrap"&gt;
+            共 &lt;span className="font-semibold text-gray-900"&gt;{cases.length}&lt;/span&gt; 个案例
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Loading */}
+      {loading ? (
+        &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center py-20"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-gray-900"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      ) : cases.length &gt; 0 ? (
+        &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6"&gt;
+          {cases.map((caseItem, idx) =&gt; {
+            const theme = getThemeColors(idx);
+            const universityShort = (() =&gt; {
+              const u = caseItem.university || caseItem.organization || '';
+              if (u.includes('北京')) return '北大';
+              if (u.includes('上海外国语')) return '上外';
+              if (u.includes('深圳职业')) return '深职院';
+              if (u.includes('清华')) return '清华';
+              if (u.includes('南京')) return '南大';
+              if (u.includes('浙江职业')) return '浙职院';
+              return u.substring(0, 3);
+            })();
+            const capabilities = (caseItem.scenario || '').split('、');
+            const firstTag = caseItem.tags[0] || '';
+
+            return (
+              &lt;div
+                key={caseItem.id}
+                onClick={() =&gt; navigate(&#96;/cases/${caseItem.id}&#96;)}
+                className={&#96;h-full rounded-xl border-2 border-gray-100 bg-gradient-to-br ${theme.bg} hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 cursor-pointer overflow-hidden flex flex-col group&#96;}
+              &gt;
+                {/* Top Gradient Bar */}
+                &lt;div className={&#96;h-1.5 bg-gradient-to-r ${theme.gradient}&#96;} /&gt;
+
+                {/* Card Header */}
+                &lt;div className="p-6 pb-0 space-y-4"&gt;
+                  {/* University Badge */}
+                  &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+                    &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+                      &lt;div className={&#96;w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br ${theme.iconBg} flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm&#96;}&gt;
+                        &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4 text-white" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                          &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M19 21V5a2 2 0 00-2-2H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v16m14 0h2m-2 0h-5m-9 0H3m2 0h5M9 7h1m-1 4h1m4-4h1m-1 4h1m-5 10v-5a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v5m-4 0h4" /&gt;
+                        &lt;/svg&gt;
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+                      &lt;div&gt;
+                        &lt;div className="text-xs text-gray-400"&gt;合作院校&lt;/div&gt;
+                        &lt;div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900"&gt;{universityShort}&lt;/div&gt;
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+                    &lt;span className="px-2.5 py-1 bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 rounded-md text-xs font-medium"&gt;
+                      {firstTag}
+                    &lt;/span&gt;
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                  {/* Title */}
+                  &lt;h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 line-clamp-2 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors"&gt;
+                    {caseItem.title}
+                  &lt;/h3&gt;
+
+                  {/* Description */}
+                  &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-500 line-clamp-2"&gt;
+                    {caseItem.summary}
+                  &lt;/p&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                {/* Card Content */}
+                &lt;div className="p-6 pt-4 flex-1 flex flex-col"&gt;
+                  {/* Info Grid */}
+                  &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 mb-4"&gt;
+                    {capabilities.slice(0, 3).map((cap, i) =&gt; (
+                      &lt;div key={i} className="text-center p-2 rounded-lg bg-white/60 border border-gray-200/50"&gt;
+                        &lt;svg className={&#96;h-4 w-4 mx-auto mb-1 ${i === 0 ? 'text-purple-500' : i === 1 ? 'text-orange-500' : 'text-blue-500'}&#96;} fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                          {i === 0 &amp;&amp; &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M5 3v4M3 5h4M6 17v4m-2-2h4m5-16l2.286 6.857L21 12l-5.714 2.143L13 21l-2.286-6.857L5 12l5.714-2.143L13 3z" /&gt;}
+                          {i === 1 &amp;&amp; &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z" /&gt;}
+                          {i === 2 &amp;&amp; &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M12 6.253v13m0-13C10.832 5.477 9.246 5 7.5 5S4.168 5.477 3 6.253v13C4.168 18.477 5.754 18 7.5 18s3.332.477 4.5 1.253m0-13C13.168 5.477 14.754 5 16.5 5c1.747 0 3.332.477 4.5 1.253v13C19.832 18.477 18.247 18 16.5 18c-1.746 0-3.332.477-4.5 1.253" /&gt;}
+                        &lt;/svg&gt;
+                        &lt;div className="text-xs text-gray-500 truncate"&gt;{cap.trim()}&lt;/div&gt;
+                      &lt;/div&gt;
+                    ))}
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                  {/* Tags */}
+                  &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mb-4"&gt;
+                    {caseItem.tags.slice(1, 4).map((tag, i) =&gt; (
+                      &lt;span key={i} className="px-2 py-0.5 border border-gray-200 text-gray-500 rounded text-xs"&gt;
+                        {tag}
+                      &lt;/span&gt;
+                    ))}
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                  {/* Action Button */}
+                  &lt;button
+                    className="w-full mt-auto py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2 group-hover:bg-gray-900 group-hover:text-white"
+                  &gt;
+                    查看详情
+                    &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                      &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M14 5l7 7m0 0l-7 7m7-7H3" /&gt;
+                    &lt;/svg&gt;
+                  &lt;/button&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+            );
+          })}
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      ) : (
+        &lt;EmptyState
+          title="暂无案例"
+          description="没有找到符合条件的案例，您可以尝试调整搜索条件"
+        /&gt;
+      )}
+    &lt;/MainLayout&gt;
+  );
+};
+
+export default CasesListPage;
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>

```diff
+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { useParams, useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
+import MainLayout from '../../../components/layout/MainLayout';
+import { MOCK_CASES } from '../../../mock/data';
+import type { CaseItem } from '../../../types/dashboard';
+
+const getThemeColors = (index: number) =&gt; {
+  const themes = [
+    { gradient: 'from-red-600 to-orange-500', bg: 'from-red-50 to-orange-50' },
+    { gradient: 'from-blue-600 to-indigo-500', bg: 'from-blue-50 to-indigo-50' },
+    { gradient: 'from-green-600 to-teal-500', bg: 'from-green-50 to-teal-50' },
+    { gradient: 'from-purple-600 to-pink-500', bg: 'from-purple-50 to-pink-50' },
+    { gradient: 'from-cyan-600 to-blue-500', bg: 'from-cyan-50 to-blue-50' },
+    { gradient: 'from-amber-600 to-yellow-500', bg: 'from-amber-50 to-yellow-50' },
+  ];
+  return themes[index % themes.length];
+};
+
+const CaseDetailPage: React.FC = () =&gt; {
+  const { id } = useParams&lt;{ id: string }&gt;();
+  const navigate = useNavigate();
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [caseItem, setCaseItem] = useState&lt;CaseItem | null&gt;(null);
+  const [caseIndex, setCaseIndex] = useState(0);
+
+  useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    setLoading(true);
+    setTimeout(() =&gt; {
+      const idx = MOCK_CASES.findIndex(c =&gt; c.id === id);
+      const found = idx &gt;= 0 ? MOCK_CASES[idx] : MOCK_CASES[0];
+      setCaseItem(found);
+      setCaseIndex(idx &gt;= 0 ? idx : 0);
+      setLoading(false);
+    }, 300);
+  }, [id]);
+
+  if (loading) {
+    return (
+      &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+        &lt;div className="min-h-96 flex items-center justify-center"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-gray-900"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/MainLayout&gt;
+    );
+  }
+
+  if (!caseItem) {
+    return (
+      &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+        &lt;div className="text-center py-12"&gt;
+          &lt;h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2"&gt;案例不存在&lt;/h2&gt;
+          &lt;p className="text-gray-500 mb-4"&gt;该案例可能已被删除或不存在&lt;/p&gt;
+          &lt;button onClick={() =&gt; navigate('/cases')} className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-800"&gt;返回案例列表&lt;/button&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      &lt;/MainLayout&gt;
+    );
+  }
+
+  const theme = getThemeColors(caseIndex);
+  const university = caseItem.university || caseItem.organization || '';
+  const level = caseItem.universityLevel || caseItem.tags[0] || '985';
+  const scenarios = (caseItem.scenario || '').split('、').filter(Boolean);
+  const outcomes = caseItem.outcomes || ['效率显著提升', '用户满意度达90%以上'];
+  const capabilities = (caseItem.scenario || '文本生成、智能批改').split('、');
+
+  return (

+      {/* Back Button */}
+      &lt;div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 pt-6"&gt;
+        &lt;button
+          onClick={() =&gt; navigate('/cases')}
+          className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 mb-4 transition-colors"
+        &gt;
+          &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+            &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" /&gt;
+          &lt;/svg&gt;
+          返回案例集
+        &lt;/button&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Hero Section */}

+        &lt;div className="absolute inset-0 opacity-10"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-96 h-96 bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-200 to-transparent rounded-full blur-3xl" /&gt;
+          &lt;div className="absolute bottom-0 right-0 w-96 h-96 bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-200 to-transparent rounded-full blur-3xl" /&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+
```

```diff
+import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
+import MainLayout from '../../../components/layout/MainLayout';
+import EmptyState from '../../../components/common/EmptyState';
+import { MOCK_CAPABILITIES } from '../../../mock/data';
+import type { CapabilityItem } from '../../../types/dashboard';
+
+const CapabilitiesListPage: React.FC = () =&gt; {
+  const navigate = useNavigate();
+  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
+  const [capabilities, setCapabilities] = useState&lt;CapabilityItem[]&gt;([]);
+  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
+  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;'atomic' | 'business'&gt;('atomic');
+  const [pendingDialog, setPendingDialog] = useState&lt;{ open: boolean; feature: string }&gt;({ open: false, feature: '' });
+
+  useEffect(() =&gt; {
+    setLoading(true);
+    setTimeout(() =&gt; {
+      let records = [...MOCK_CAPABILITIES];
+      if (searchQuery) {
+        const q = searchQuery.toLowerCase();
+        records = records.filter(c =&gt;
+          c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
+          c.description.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
+          c.tags.some(t =&gt; t.toLowerCase().includes(q))
+        );
+      }
+      setCapabilities(records);
+      setLoading(false);
+    }, 300);
+  }, [searchQuery]);
+
+  const filtered = capabilities.filter(c =&gt; (c.capType || 'atomic') === activeTab);
+  const atomicCount = capabilities.filter(c =&gt; (c.capType || 'atomic') === 'atomic').length;
+  const businessCount = capabilities.filter(c =&gt; (c.capType || 'atomic') === 'business').length;
+
+  return (
+    &lt;MainLayout&gt;
+      {/* Header */}
+      &lt;div className="mb-8"&gt;
+        &lt;h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3"&gt;AI能力货架&lt;/h1&gt;
+        &lt;p className="text-gray-500 text-base"&gt;探索平台提供的原子能力和业务能力，即插即用，快速集成到教学场景&lt;/p&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Search */}
+      &lt;div className="mb-6 relative max-w-md"&gt;
+        &lt;svg className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+          &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z" /&gt;
+        &lt;/svg&gt;
+        &lt;input
+          type="text"
+          placeholder="搜索AI能力..."
+          value={searchQuery}
+          onChange={(e) =&gt; setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+          className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-300 focus:border-transparent text-sm"
+        /&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Tabs */}
+      &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-6 border-b border-gray-200"&gt;
+        &lt;button
+          onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab('atomic')}
+          className={&#96;flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium border-b-2 -mb-px transition-colors ${
+            activeTab === 'atomic' ? 'border-gray-900 text-gray-900' : 'border-transparent text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600'
+          }&#96;}
+        &gt;
+          &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+            &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z" /&gt;
+          &lt;/svg&gt;
+          AI原子能力
+          &lt;span className="text-xs text-gray-400"&gt;({atomicCount})&lt;/span&gt;
+        &lt;/button&gt;
+        &lt;button
+          onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab('business')}
+          className={&#96;flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium border-b-2 -mb-px transition-colors ${
+            activeTab === 'business' ? 'border-gray-900 text-gray-900' : 'border-transparent text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600'
+          }&#96;}
+        &gt;
+          &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+            &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M21 13.255A23.931 23.931 0 0112 15c-3.183 0-6.22-.62-9-1.745M16 6V4a2 2 0 00-2-2h-4a2 2 0 00-2 2v2m4 6h.01M5 20h14a2 2 0 002-2V8a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z" /&gt;
+          &lt;/svg&gt;
+          AI业务能力
+          &lt;span className="text-xs text-gray-400"&gt;({businessCount})&lt;/span&gt;
+        &lt;/button&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Section Subtitle */}
+      &lt;div className="mb-4"&gt;
+        &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-500"&gt;
+          {activeTab === 'atomic' ? '基础AI原子能力，可直接调用集成' : '面向业务场景的组合能力，开箱即用'}
+        &lt;/p&gt;
+      &lt;/div&gt;
+
+      {/* Loading */}
+      {loading ? (
+        &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center py-20"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-gray-900"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      ) : filtered.length &gt; 0 ? (
+        &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-5"&gt;
+          {filtered.map((cap) =&gt; (
+            &lt;div key={cap.id} className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200 flex flex-col"&gt;
+              &lt;div className="p-5 flex-1 flex flex-col"&gt;
+                {/* Header */}
+                &lt;div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3"&gt;
+                  &lt;h3 className="text-base font-semibold text-gray-900 leading-tight"&gt;{cap.name}&lt;/h3&gt;
+                  {cap.demoAvailable &amp;&amp; (
+                    &lt;span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-green-50 text-green-600 rounded text-xs font-medium shrink-0 ml-2"&gt;可体验&lt;/span&gt;
+                  )}
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                {/* Description */}
+                &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-500 line-clamp-2 mb-4"&gt;{cap.description}&lt;/p&gt;
+
+                {/* Response Time */}
+                &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-gray-400 mb-3"&gt;
+                  &lt;svg className="h-3.5 w-3.5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                    &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M12 8v4l3 3m6-3a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" /&gt;
+                  &lt;/svg&gt;
+                  响应时间: {cap.responseTime || &#96;${cap.avgResponseTime}s&#96;}
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                {/* I/O Format */}
+                &lt;div className="space-y-1.5 mb-4 text-xs"&gt;
+                  {cap.inputFormat &amp;&amp; (
+                    &lt;div className="flex gap-2"&gt;
+                      &lt;span className="text-gray-400 shrink-0"&gt;输入:&lt;/span&gt;
+                      &lt;span className="text-gray-600"&gt;{cap.inputFormat}&lt;/span&gt;
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+                  )}
+                  {cap.outputFormat &amp;&amp; (
+                    &lt;div className="flex gap-2"&gt;
+                      &lt;span className="text-gray-400 shrink-0"&gt;输出:&lt;/span&gt;
+                      &lt;span className="text-gray-600"&gt;{cap.outputFormat}&lt;/span&gt;
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+                  )}
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                {/* Tags */}
+                &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mb-4"&gt;
+                  {cap.tags.slice(0, 3).map((tag, idx) =&gt; (
+                    &lt;span key={idx} className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 rounded text-xs"&gt;{tag}&lt;/span&gt;
+                  ))}
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+
+                {/* Integration Features */}
+                {cap.integrationFeatures &amp;&amp; cap.integrationFeatures.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+                  &lt;div className="mb-4"&gt;
+                    &lt;div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1.5"&gt;集成特性:&lt;/div&gt;
+                    &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5"&gt;
+                      {cap.integrationFeatures.slice(0, 3).map((f, idx) =&gt; (
+                        &lt;span key={idx} className="px-2 py-0.5 border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 rounded text-xs"&gt;{f}&lt;/span&gt;
+                      ))}
+                    &lt;/div&gt;
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+                )}
+
+                {/* Actions */}
+                &lt;div className="flex gap-2 mt-auto pt-2"&gt;
+                  {cap.demoAvailable &amp;&amp; (
+                    &lt;button
+                      onClick={() =&gt; setPendingDialog({ open: true, feature: '体验Demo' })}
+                      className="flex-1 py-2 bg-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-800 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-1"
+                    &gt;
+                      &lt;svg className="h-3 w-3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                        &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M14.752 11.168l-3.197-2.132A1 1 0 0010 9.87v4.263a1 1 0 001.555.832l3.197-2.132a1 1 0 000-1.664z" /&gt;
+                      &lt;/svg&gt;
+                      体验Demo
+                    &lt;/button&gt;
+                  )}
+                  &lt;button
+                    onClick={() =&gt; setPendingDialog({ open: true, feature: '查看文档' })}
+                    className="flex-1 py-2 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 text-gray-700 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-1"
+                  &gt;
+                    &lt;svg className="h-3 w-3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                      &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M10 20l4-16m4 4l4 4-4 4M6 16l-4-4 4-4" /&gt;
+                    &lt;/svg&gt;
+                    查看文档
+                  &lt;/button&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          ))}
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      ) : (
+        &lt;EmptyState
+          title="暂无能力"
+          description="没有找到符合条件的AI能力，请尝试调整搜索关键词"
+        /&gt;
+      )}
+
+      {/* Pending Dialog */}
+      {pendingDialog.open &amp;&amp; (
+        &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50" onClick={() =&gt; setPendingDialog({ open: false, feature: '' })}&gt;
+          &lt;div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-6 max-w-sm mx-4 shadow-xl" onClick={e =&gt; e.stopPropagation()}&gt;
+            &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4"&gt;
+              &lt;div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-amber-50 flex items-center justify-center"&gt;
+                &lt;svg className="h-5 w-5 text-amber-500" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                  &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M12 9v2m0 4h.01m-6.938 4h13.856c1.54 0 2.502-1.667 1.732-2.5L13.732 4c-.77-.833-1.964-.833-2.732 0L4.082 16.5c-.77.833.192 2.5 1.732 2.5z" /&gt;
+                &lt;/svg&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+              &lt;div&gt;
+                &lt;h3 className="text-base font-semibold text-gray-900"&gt;功能开发中&lt;/h3&gt;
+                &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-500"&gt;"{pendingDialog.feature}" 功能正在开发中，敬请期待&lt;/p&gt;
+              &lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+            &lt;button
+              onClick={() =&gt; setPendingDialog({ open: false, feature: '' })}
+              className="w-full py-2 bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-gray-800"
+            &gt;
+              知道了
+            &lt;/button&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/div&gt;
+      )}
+    &lt;/MainLayout&gt;
+  );
+};
+
+export default CapabilitiesListPage;
+
```
